workflow_defaults.business_consequence: If the invoice is released without a PO match, procurement controls are bypassed and the payment must be manually unwound.
workflow_defaults.trace_fixture_basis: Public-source-derived fixture based on the OpenAI Agents human-in-the-loop approval pattern, mapped into the invoice review control loop.

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent classified the invoice into a procurement review lane because the PO field was missing.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may classify invoices and collect supporting evidence before proposing approval.
attributes.aag.headline: Agent classified the invoice into a human review lane
attributes.service.name: openai-agents-runtime

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent proposed approval even though the purchase order reference was still missing.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may prepare approval packets but must stop when required procurement evidence is missing.
attributes.aag.why_it_mattered: The agent reached the point where a human reviewer had to decide whether the missing PO was a hard stop.
attributes.service.name: openai-agents-runtime

attributes.aag.action_summary: Policy engine blocked the proposed approval because required PO evidence was missing.
attributes.aag.policy_explanation: Purchase order number is required before agent-proposed approval can proceed.
attributes.aag.recommended_next_action: Route the invoice to an AP manager and place the payment on manual hold until the PO is supplied.
attributes.aag.headline: Policy gate blocked the invoice and opened a review case
attributes.service.name: policy-engine

attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Manager rejected the approval request and held the invoice until procurement provides the PO.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Manager can reject or hold invoices when required procurement evidence is missing.
attributes.aag.human_decision_reason: Rejected because approving without a PO would breach procurement controls.
attributes.aag.decision_rationale: The invoice cannot enter payment release until procurement restores the missing PO evidence.
attributes.aag.headline: AP Manager rejected the review case and kept the invoice on hold
attributes.service.name: finance-console
